Enforce least privilege for all agent tool permissions; per-tool permission manifests, minimum scope, irreversibility classification
Restrict agents to minimum necessary tool capabilities; disable unused tools, enforce human confirmation for irreversible operations

mappings.control_name: Protection and Prevention — agent tool access controls
mappings.notes: Implement security controls enforcing least privilege on agent tool access; validate all tool parameters as untrusted; enforce human confirmation for irreversible operations

mappings.control_name: ICT Risk Management — agent tool governance
mappings.notes: Include agent tool access policies in ICT risk management framework; define acceptable tool scopes per agent role and financial function; classify tool irreversibility
Monitor agent tool invocation patterns for anomalous usage — destructive parameters, unusual tool sequences, scope violations; alert on detection
Include tool misuse scenarios in resilience testing; test whether agents can be manipulated into destructive tool invocations or harmful parameter injection
